mechanism.description: Aetheric pressure trough caused by lunar/solar mass alignment blocking aetheric flow to surface
key_claims: Signal will be NEGATIVE (pressure drop)
Signal will TRACK eclipse geometry not local solar noon
Signal magnitude scales with coverage fraction
Signal magnitude scales with geomagnetic latitude
Peak timing correlates with maximum obscuration not noon

step_by_step: 1. BOU 2017 baseline = -10.9 nT at 99% coverage, lat 40.0N
derivation.caveat: BOU 2017 baseline flagged as disturbed day. If quiet-day baseline differs, scale accordingly.

scoring_matrix.claim: Peak timing tracks eclipse geometry not solar noon
scoring_matrix.note: This is the strongest mechanistic test - globe model has no prediction here

scoring_matrix.claim: Signal scales with coverage fraction across stations
scoring_matrix.note: Multi-station correlation is model-distinguishing - cannot be explained by random noise

scoring_matrix.claim: Non-path stations show less than 2 nT

model_distinguishing.description: Tests where dome and globe models make DIFFERENT predictions

tests.globe_predicts: No prediction - globe has no eclipse magnetic mechanism

tests.dome_predicts: Linear correlation between coverage % and signal nT
tests.globe_predicts: No systematic prediction
tests.verdict_if_dome_correct: Cannot be explained by coincidence across independent stations

tests.globe_predicts: Would expect tidal signal if mass-based

calibration.model_breaks_if: Signal is positive OR signal shows no geometry correlation

weekly_tests.title: Huancayo (HUA) Lunar Transit Magnetic Anomaly
weekly_tests.description: Z-component drop during Moon zenith passage
weekly_tests.mechanism: Aetheric pressure trough from lunar mass
weekly_tests.assessment: Signal exists in literature but below single-station detection threshold. Not a model failure - a detection method limitation. Multi-station averaging required for sub-2nT signals.
weekly_tests.implication: Eclipse predictions at -5.8 to -9.5 nT are well above detection threshold - method valid

weekly_tests.title: SAA Node Separation vs CHAOS-7
weekly_tests.description: Current great-circle distance between African and South American cells

weekly_tests.title: Telluric 11.78 Hz Peak Confirmation
weekly_tests.mechanism: Disc thickness resonance T = c/(2f) = 12,717 km

weekly_tests.title: 2024 Eclipse 9-Station Data Replication
weekly_tests.description: Reproduce Nov 2024 paper results using 3-day quiet baseline subtraction
weekly_tests.data_source: INTERMAGNET 1-minute (BOU, FRD, CMO, BSL, TUC, DHT, NEW, OTT, STJ)
weekly_tests.result_value: Mixed: CMO/NEW match (-17nT, SNR>4) but 7 stations failed noise/data.

weekly_tests.title: SAA Minimum Intensity
weekly_tests.description: Current field strength at South American node

weekly_tests.title: Geomagnetic Jerk Precursor Monitor
weekly_tests.description: Second derivative changes indicating jerk onset

weekly_tests.title: Solar Wind / Pole Drift Correlation
weekly_tests.mechanism: Aether flow modulation by solar wind

weekly_tests.title: SAA African Cell Intensity Check
weekly_tests.formula: WIN-005 decay rate: 21,880 nT declining ~85 nT/year
weekly_tests.mechanism: Aetheric rim degradation accelerating African lobe decay

weekly_tests.title: North Pole Position Check
weekly_tests.formula: WIN-007 exponential approach, deviation -18.06 at 2025 accelerating
weekly_tests.mechanism: Precession vortex convergence toward Polaris axis

weekly_tests.title: Field Decay Rate Confirmation
weekly_tests.prediction: Global dipole decreased >= 28 nT since March 2025

weekly_tests.title: Schumann 7.83 Hz Anomaly Persistence
weekly_tests.prediction: Measured Schumann fundamental remains 7.83 Hz +/- 0.3 Hz
weekly_tests.formula: F3: theoretical 10.59 Hz vs measured 7.83 Hz, gap = 2.76 Hz from aetheric damping
weekly_tests.mechanism: Aetheric damping of enclosed resonant cavity

weekly_tests.title: Crepuscular Ray Divergence
weekly_tests.prediction: Crepuscular rays show divergence angles > 0.5 degrees
weekly_tests.formula: arctan(horizontal_distance / sun_altitude_5733km) — parallel rays impossible at 150M km
weekly_tests.mechanism: Local compact sun at 5,733 km altitude producing diverging rays

weekly_tests.title: Lunar Phase Magnetic Correlation
weekly_tests.prediction: Z component shift 0.5-2.0 nT correlated with full moon March 11
weekly_tests.formula: F1 scaled: full moon alignment produces measurable Z shift
weekly_tests.note: SNR likely marginal — log as below_detection_threshold if SNR < 2.0

weekly_tests.title: Baseline Recalibration from W004
weekly_tests.prediction: True quiet-day baseline = -6.5 to -7.5 nT (recalculated from W004 overshoot)
weekly_tests.mechanism: Formula self-correction — W004 overshoot indicates BOU 2017 disturbed-day baseline inflated by ~35-40%
weekly_tests.note: This recalibration adjusts PRED-001 through PRED-005 downward ~30% for August eclipse
